# AI Decision Log

> This file records all decisions made autonomously by AI agents during auto-proceed mode.
> Managed by: `x-ipe-tool-decision-making` skill
> Location: `x-ipe-docs/decision_made_by_ai.md`
>
> **Column Guide:**
> - **#** — Decision ID (D-001, D-002, ...) — globally unique, auto-incremented
> - **Date** — When the decision was made (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM)
> - **Task ID** — The task that triggered the decision (TASK-XXX)
> - **Feature ID** — Associated feature (FEATURE-XXX or N/A)
> - **Skill** — The calling skill that invoked decision-making
> - **Workflow** — Workflow name or N/A for free-mode
> - **Type** — question / conflict / routing
> - **Status** — ✅ Resolved / ⚠️ Unresolved
> - **Link** — Anchor to the detail section below

## Decision Registry

| # | Date | Task ID | Feature ID | Skill | Workflow | Type | Status | Link |
|---|------|---------|------------|-------|----------|------|--------|------|

---
